name: Currency Exchange Rate API
description: Real-time and historical currency exchange rates from the European Central Bank (ECB). Supports 30+ currencies with conversion, latest rates, and historical data back to 1999. Fast responses with 1-hour caching. No external API key needed.

endpoints.name: Get Latest Rates
endpoints.description: Get latest exchange rates for a base currency. Returns all 30+ supported currencies.

endpoints.name: Convert Currency
endpoints.description: Convert an amount from one currency to another using real-time rates.

endpoints.name: List Currencies
endpoints.description: List all supported currencies with their full names.

endpoints.name: Historical Rates
endpoints.description: Get exchange rates for a specific historical date (back to 1999).

longDescription:
## Currency Exchange Rate API

Access real-time and historical currency exchange rates from the European Central Bank (ECB).

### Features
- **30+ currencies** including USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CNY, BRL, and more
- **Real-time rates** updated daily by the ECB
- **Historical data** back to January 1999
- **Currency conversion** with precise calculations
- **Fast responses** with 1-hour server-side caching

### Use Cases
- E-commerce price conversion
- Financial dashboards
- Travel apps
- Accounting software
- Portfolio tracking

### Data Source
All rates are sourced from the European Central Bank via the Frankfurter API, ensuring reliable and accurate data.
long_description:
Real-time and historical currency exchange rates from the European Central Bank (ECB). Supports 30+ currencies with conversion, latest rates, and historical data back to 1999. Fast responses with 1-hour caching. No external API key needed.

💎 FREE tier available! Upgrade to Pro for 50,000 requests/month, higher rate limits, and priority support. Ultra and Mega plans available for enterprise-scale usage.
